summary: Completed responsive design testing for FocusForest application. Tested mobile (<768px) and desktop (>=768px) views across multiple screen sizes. Key responsive features working correctly including conditional navigation rendering and modal responsiveness.

deployment_issues.issue: Client-side routing not handled properly - direct navigation to routes like /dashboard, /calendar returns 404
deployment_issues.impact: Prevents testing of individual pages via direct URL access
deployment_issues.workaround: Navigation works through app routing and mobile bottom nav

responsive_design_success.details: Appears only on mobile (<768px), hidden on desktop
Appears only on desktop (>=768px), hidden on mobile
Shows 2x2 grid layout on mobile as required
Timer, forest image, and controls adapt properly between mobile and desktop
768px breakpoint correctly switches between mobile and desktop layouts

passed_tests: Navigation between pages via mobile bottom nav
Mobile header display on small screens
action_item_for_main_agent: Configure proper SPA routing for production deployment to handle client-side routes. Consider using a proper web server (nginx/apache) with fallback to index.html for SPA routing instead of Python's SimpleHTTPServer.
